Our Services

Comprehensive specialist care, under one roof.

From first consultation to complex procedures, the clinic offers a full spectrum of specialist services. Every treatment begins with a thorough consultation and ends with a clear recovery plan.

Conditions We Treat

What brings patients to us.

Conditions we diagnose and treat every day.

Migraine

Recurring severe headaches with nausea and light sensitivity -- accurately diagnosed and effectively managed.

Learn More

Epilepsy

Seizure disorders diagnosed with EEG and controlled with modern anti-epileptic medications.

Learn More

Stroke

Emergency neurological care and comprehensive rehabilitation programmes to restore function after stroke.

Learn More

Parkinson's Disease

Progressive movement disorder managed with medications, therapy, and regular neurological monitoring.

Learn More
Why It Matters

Early treatment leads to better outcomes.

Many conditions are progressive. What starts as mild discomfort can escalate into serious, harder-to-treat problems if left unaddressed. Timely diagnosis and intervention often means simpler, less invasive treatment -- and significantly better recovery.

  • Early-stage conditions can often be managed without surgery
  • Damage is more reversible when treated promptly
  • Non-surgical options are more effective in early stages
  • Recovery time reduces significantly with early intervention
Procedures We Do

Surgical & non-surgical treatments.

Advanced procedures performed at our affiliated hospitals by our experienced team.

EEG Test

Non-invasive brain activity recording used to diagnose epilepsy, sleep disorders, and brain function abnormalities.

Learn More

Nerve Conduction Study

Measures nerve signal speed to detect neuropathy, carpal tunnel syndrome, and peripheral nerve damage.

Learn More

Botox for Migraine

Preventive Botox injections that reduce chronic migraine frequency and intensity significantly.

Learn More

Stroke Rehabilitation

Structured recovery programme to restore movement, speech, and cognitive abilities after a stroke event.

Learn More
